form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 515m at this track. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 515m. Last start finished 4th on April 13 over 515m at this track behind Dash Intention beaten 4.5 lengths (30.14) in a Grade 5. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 515m. Last start finished 4th on April 13 over 515m at this track behind Dash Intention beaten 4.5 lengths (30.14) in a Grade 5. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (29.86) in a Grade 5, finishing a half a length second. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (29.86) in a Grade 5, finishing a half a length second. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on April 16 over 460m at Warragul behind Idron Bale beaten 11 lengths (26.93) in a Grade 4/5. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th on April 16 over 460m at Warragul behind Idron Bale beaten 11 lengths (26.93) in a Grade 4/5. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at Mt Gambier. Others have better credentials.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at Mt Gambier. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.50) at Warragul in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from eight starts. Makes appeal on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (26.50) at Warragul in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from eight starts. Makes appeal on best.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Has ability but will need the right run to feature here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Lost ground in back straight.
